STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_BROT: Whenever another player plays a [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold], add a [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SERP: Whenever any player plays a [gold]Shiv[/gold], all players gain [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever any player plays a [gold]Shiv[/gold], all players gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_TIGE: Whenever you play a card of a different type than the previous one, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
Whenever you play a card of a different type than the previous one, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_DRAW: The next time you draw your hand, draw [blue]1[/blue] fewer card, then remove this.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_CHEC: At the end of your player turn, if you played no [gold]Attack[/gold], lose [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] fewer card the next time your hand is dealt; the caster gains [blue]{Amount:cond:>0?3|2}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and draws [blue]{Amount:cond:>0?2|1}[/blue] extra card(s) next turn.

At the end of your player turn, if you played no [gold]Attack[/gold], lose [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] fewer card the next time your hand is dealt; the caster gains [blue]{Amount:cond:>0?3|2}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and draws [blue]{Amount:cond:>0?2|1}[/blue] extra card(s) next turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_CORP: [gold]At the end of a player's turn[/gold], they lose HP, then this is removed.
[gold]At the end of a player's turn[/gold], they lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then this is removed.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_BOUN: When this creature dies, the player who dealt the killing blow gains [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to its Max HP (capped).
When killed, the killing player gains [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to its Max HP, up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_DOUB: Take double damage from [gold]powered Attacks[/gold] this turn.
Take double damage from [gold]powered Attacks[/gold] this turn{Amount:plural:| [blue]{}[/blue] times}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SHAR: Gain [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_HANG: Next turn start at 0 [gold]Energy[/gold]; gain [gold]No Draw[/gold]; may play only [blue]1[/blue] more card this turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_PER_: During your current player phase, whenever you spend [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], channel a fixed number of random [gold]Orbs[/gold].
During your current player phase, whenever you spend [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], channel [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random [gold]Orb(s)[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SING: You may play only [blue]1[/blue] more card this turn.
